ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the match belongs to */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match type */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stadium FOREIGN KEY ("stadium") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_type_id") REFERENCES match_types ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_types" (
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match type */,
  "match_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the match type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the match type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "possession_home" REAL /* Percentage of possession for the home team */,
  "possession_away" REAL /* Percentage of possession for the away team */,
  "shots_on_goal_home" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal for the home team */,
  "shots_on_goal_away" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal for the away team */,
  "corners_home" INTEGER /* Number of corners for the home team */,
  "corners_away" INTEGER /* Number of corners for the away team */,
  "fouls_home" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the home team */,
  "fouls_away" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, in-app) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message contained in the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the referee represents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_referees" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the referee officiated */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the referee (e.g., main referee, assistant referee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "referee_id")
)
